title: Irish Lamb Stew
description: A hearty and comforting lamb stew, inspired by traditional Irish cuisine. This dish is perfect for a cold winter's night.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large pot over medium-high heat.
Brown the lamb cubes in batches, then set aside.
Reduce heat to medium and add the chopped onion, cooking until softened.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chopped carrots and potatoes, cooking for 5 minutes.
Add the browned lamb back into the pot, along with 2 cups of water.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 1.5 hours.
Stir in the flour to thicken the stew.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
